recommendations.title: Tokyo Fiancée
recommendations.overview: A Japanophile young Belgian woman in Tokyo falls into a whirlwind romance with a Francophile Japanese student, in this charming and tender tale of young love and cultural discovery.

recommendations.title: Save the Date
recommendations.overview: After breaking up with her boyfriend, a bookstore manager resists a seemingly perfect guy's attempts to woo her.

recommendations.title: Still Out of My League
recommendations.overview: After breaking up with her dreamboat, Marta finds love with an artist. But life throws a few twists into the mix for the ailing woman and her friends.

recommendations.title: Almost Adults
recommendations.overview: A film about growing apart when growing up. Two best friends relationship strains when one deals with her newfound sexuality and the other with breaking up with her long term boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Natural Selection
recommendations.overview: Tyler is a young man who is desperately seeking direction from a world that seems to have abandoned him. Searching for answers he looks to his new friend Indrid who appears to have it all figured out.

recommendations.title: Father Frost
recommendations.overview: A fairy tale about a conceited young man and a young woman with a tyrannical step-mother, who must overcome magical trials in order to be together.

recommendations.title: Spanish Affair 2
recommendations.overview: Amaia after breaking up with Rafa, falls in love with a Catalonian. Koldo, her father, goes to Sevilla to persuade Rafa to go to Catalonia and take Amaia's heart back.

recommendations.title: My Fake Boyfriend
recommendations.overview: A young man in a tricky situation follows the advice of his unconventional best friend and uses social media to create a fake boyfriend to keep his awful ex-lover out of his life. But everything backfires when he meets the real love of his life, and

recommendations.title: Clara
recommendations.overview: An astronomer becomes obsessed with searching the cosmos for signs of life beyond Earth which leads to a shocking discovery.

recommendations.title: The Cosmos on the Commode
recommendations.overview: Four comedic episodes framed within the story of a tyrannical Zen master and his two hapless disciples.
